reference_answer: The force of wind on the MARMAC 27 (and particularly on the production platform), pushing the barge to the south, caused the towline to pull on the stern of the tugboat, causing it to heel to port
supporting_source_spans: Analysis section

reference_answer: The doghouse was partially submerged and inaccessible; the winch engine was not running; and the engine room was inaccessible due to the extreme port heel

reference_answer: $2 million estimated

reference_answer: Crew estimated 85–100 mph (74–87 knots); closest NWS station (22–27 miles away) reported gusts of 48–62 knots
supporting_source_spans: Analysis section

reference_answer: The mate did not recall hearing updated weather forecasts over VHF radio, thus was unaware of Special Marine Warnings issued at 1501 and 1544, though whether they actually reached the vessel is not definitively established
supporting_source_spans: Analysis section

reference_answer: The exact nature of the storm phenomena (possible waterspout, wind shear vortex, or severe straight-line winds) was not definitively identified; the mate's description of 'maybe a waterspout' was not confirmed
supporting_source_spans: Event Sequence section, Analysis section

reference_answer: Final Investigation Report with probable cause definitively determined (issued May 15, 2025)
supporting_source_spans: Report metadata, Probable Cause section

reference_answer: The closest NWS weather reporting station (KGLS) was located about 22 miles north of the casualty site; buoy stations were 25–27 miles away
supporting_source_spans: Additional Information section, Environmental Information, Reported Weather subsection

reference_answer: Salvage operations from May 18 to June 15 produced multiple fractures and indentations that appeared to be from recovery activities, complicating the analysis of impact damage
supporting_source_spans: Additional Information section, Damage subsection

reference_answer: The mate stated he did not recall hearing any updated weather forecasts over VHF radio after the initial phone call from shoreside, leaving uncertainty about what information actually reached the vessel
